3030620.name: Kappa's Asylum
3030620.description:
Synopsis:

Kappa's Asylum is a survival horror game in which you control a YouTuber in an
abandoned asylum to record a video.

Yumi is a young woman who wants to be a famous YouTuber.
One day Yumi receives a suggestion from her friend to go to the abandoned
asylum to record a video.

Features:

- This game is inspired by japanese urban legends.
- You are not a fighter, you have to run or hide to survive the enemies.
- Unpredictable Enemies: You cannot know when you will be surprised by enemies.
3030620.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
